'''wothamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wodgy|wodgy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wodgy|wodgy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wothamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wothamithi|wothamithi]] || [[word:wothamiji|wothamiji]] || [[word:wothamishi|wothamishi]] || [[word:wothamiki|wothamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wothamuthuthu|wothamuthuthu]] || [[word:wothamujuju|wothamujuju]] || [[word:wothamushushu|wothamushushu]] || [[word:wothamukuku|wothamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wothamuthu|wothamuthu]] || [[word:wothamuju|wothamuju]] || [[word:wothamushu|wothamushu]] || [[word:wothamuku|wothamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wothamufthuf|wothamufthuf]] || [[word:wothamufjuf|wothamufjuf]] || [[word:wothamufshuf|wothamufshuf]] || [[word:wothamufkuf|wothamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wothamethe|wothamethe]] || [[word:wothameje|wothameje]] || [[word:wothameshe|wothameshe]] || [[word:wothameke|wothameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wothamothotho|wothamothotho]] || [[word:wothamojojo|wothamojojo]] || [[word:wothamoshosho|wothamoshosho]] || [[word:wothamokoko|wothamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wothamotho|wothamotho]] || [[word:wothamojo|wothamojo]] || [[word:wothamosho|wothamosho]] || [[word:wothamoko|wothamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wothamofthof|wothamofthof]] || [[word:wothamofjof|wothamofjof]] || [[word:wothamofshof|wothamofshof]] || [[word:wothamofkof|wothamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wothamïfthïf|wothamïfthïf]] || [[word:wothamïfjïf|wothamïfjïf]] || [[word:wothamïfshïf|wothamïfshïf]] || [[word:wothamïfkïf|wothamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wothamïfthïfthïf|wothamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wothamïfjïfjïf|wothamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wothamïfshïfshïf|wothamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wothamïfkïfkïf|wothamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wothamïfthïf|wothamïfthïf]] || [[word:wothamïfjïf|wothamïfjïf]] || [[word:wothamïfshïf|wothamïfshïf]] || [[word:wothamïfkïf|wothamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wothamïfthïf|wothamïfthïf]] || [[word:wothamïfjïf|wothamïfjïf]] || [[word:wothamïfshïf|wothamïfshïf]] || [[word:wothamïfkïf|wothamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wothamæthæ|wothamæthæ]] || [[word:wothamæjæ|wothamæjæ]] || [[word:wothamæshæ|wothamæshæ]] || [[word:wothamækæ|wothamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wothamathatha|wothamathatha]] || [[word:wothamajaja|wothamajaja]] || [[word:wothamashasha|wothamashasha]] || [[word:wothamakaka|wothamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wothamatha|wothamatha]] || [[word:wothamaja|wothamaja]] || [[word:wothamasha|wothamasha]] || [[word:wothamaka|wothamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wothamafthaf|wothamafthaf]] || [[word:wothamafjaf|wothamafjaf]] || [[word:wothamafshaf|wothamafshaf]] || [[word:wothamafkaf|wothamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wothamasha|wothamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wothamshësha|wothamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wothamrosha|wothamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wothamusha|wothamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wothamyasha|wothamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowothamnkshësha|gowothamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowothamnkrosha|gowothamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowothamnkmusha|gowothamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowothamnkyasha|gowothamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wothathamasha|wothathamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wothathamshësha|wothathamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wothathamrosha|wothathamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wothathamusha|wothathamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wothathamyasha|wothathamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowothathamnkshësha|gowothathamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowothathamnkrosha|gowothathamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowothathamnkmusha|gowothathamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowothathamnkyasha|gowothathamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wethæmasha|wethæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wethæmshësha|wethæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wethæmrosha|wethæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wethæmusha|wethæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wethæmyasha|wethæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowethæmnkshësha|gowethæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowethæmnkrosha|gowethæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowethæmnkmusha|gowethæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowethæmnkyasha|gowethæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wothfamasha|wothfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wothfamshësha|wothfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wothfamrosha|wothfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wothfamusha|wothfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wothfamyasha|wothfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowothfamnkshësha|gowothfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowothfamnkrosha|gowothfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowothfamnkmusha|gowothfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowothfamnkyasha|gowothfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
